description: Short-form ad variant generation with routing, retries, and approval instrumentation.
primaryGoal: Improve time to first acceptable ad cut while preserving cost discipline.
humanRubric: Hook matches brief in first 3 seconds
CTA remains editable for follow-up variants

description: Product demo / spokesperson clips with editability, dialogue continuity, and approval telemetry.
primaryGoal: Reduce review cycles for spokesperson and product walkthrough videos.
humanRubric: Dialogue or lip-sync remains usable after edits
Product framing stays on-brand across revisions
